text:
Last month, I launched Bible Buddy

It just crossed 10K active users!

Its an amazing use of AI to help people grow closer to the Bible via WhatsApp

The aim is to touch the lives of 1 Billion+ people 

(Check pinned tweet for link  - its free)

I get 100s of emails a day

This one touched me

Conversations are powerful

We just crossed 25K Active Users 

Bible Buddy is a tool that helps people grow their faith

You can chat to the Bible like its your best friend! 

(Check below for the link  - its free)

Mum used her credit card to help fund my start up (approx £3k)

18months in, and I’m so happy to have paid off all her debts today (car + loan + credit)

Earlier this morning…

Bible Buddy hit 50K users!

It was launched 2 months ago

Its an amazing use of AI to help people grow their faith 

Chat with the Bible like never before and find guidance, inspiration and support for life’s challenges and blessings!

Bible Buddy on Product Hunt 

An AI Scripture based Chatbot helping Christians grow their faith.

Sometimes screenshots of Bible verses are not enough.

Chat with the Bible like never before and find guidance, inspiration and support for life’s challenges and blessings!

3 weeks ago I launched Bible Buddy

It allows you to chat to the Bible like its your best friend!

It just crossed 100K messages

However, what Im most happy about is the endless DMs I get about the positive impact on people 

(Check pinned tweet for link - its free)
